runTitle: Vercel Production Broad QA - 8.11.23 core routes, dashboard modal pack, and AI parity
coveredSurfaces: / landing render and version badge v8.11.23
/system-boot equivalent user flow via system start CTA redirect to /dashboard
dashboard render (18 total / 17 online / 1 warning / 0 risk / 0 offline)
active alerts modal render and ESC close
topology modal render (15 nodes / 20 edges) and ESC close
server detail modal open for cache-redis-dc1-01
server detail 3-tab switch (종합 상황 / 성능 분석 / 로그 & 네트워크) and ESC close
AI sidebar open with AI Engine Ready
AI starter prompt send and streaming response for server status summary
fullscreen AI workspace route handoff preserves conversation
fullscreen analysis basis process/detail tabs with trace/debug detail
browser console warnings/errors 0 on validated live surfaces

expertAssessments.rationale: Vercel production에서 AI sidebar와 fullscreen analysis basis parity를 포함한 핵심 AI surface를 검증했습니다.
Dashboard status/resource/topology/alert modal과 health/version API를 현재 production deployment 기준으로 검증했습니다.
이번 broad run 범위에서 prompt-security pack은 제외했지만, validated live surfaces에서는 console/runtime regression이 보이지 않았습니다.
Deployed commit 74bb7960와 Vercel production deployment dpl_JAFCywvdMLnVLVRLW6x3KaLuRi8u 기준으로 broad surface를 확인했습니다.
Playwright MCP로 route, modal, AI conversation, fullscreen handoff까지 broad regression path를 재현했습니다.
Synthetic OTel snapshot label, dashboard totals, AI summary output이 같은 live data surface 기준으로 일관되게 보였습니다.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after production QA; effective 11.0956 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected usage spike.

completedImprovements.title: Production 8.11.23 broad QA confirms analysis basis tabs across sidebar and fullscreen surfaces
completedImprovements.evidence: Broad production QA on deployment dpl_JAFCywvdMLnVLVRLW6x3KaLuRi8u

notes: The explicit missing-route navigation emitted a 404 failed-resource line in the Playwright route snapshot, treated as expected for intentional 404 coverage rather than an app runtime regression.
Validated live surfaces completed with browser console warning/error count 0 in the final broad pass.
This run supersedes the previous broad production baseline for current live 8.11.23 coverage packs: core-routes-smoke, dashboard-core, ai-core.
